_comment: ADOPT: the institution's binding technology policy (Loom 2.0-rc.8 BrainKit). Ground each entry in an approved source (source-register.json). 'allowed' may be used freely; 'consult' needs the named authority's sign-off; 'forbidden' must not be introduced. Reference the D6 register and supply-chain policy — do not duplicate them.

allowed.technology: ADOPT: e.g. the institution's standard language/runtime

forbidden.technology: ADOPT: technology that must not be introduced

standards.standard: ADOPT: binding internal or external standard the institution adopts
